data.title: Millionaire trader prefers Dogecoin, Solana ETFs over XRP; views Bonk as high-potential meme coin with catalysts.
data.description: According to a wealthy meme coin trader, the cryptocurrency market is abuzz with various factors, such as the upcoming Dogecoin ETF and potential rate cuts. However, amidst this activity, a highly promising meme coin seems to have gone unnoticed. Recently, the trader highlighted that Bonk has surged out of a descending wedge pattern over several months with significant trading volume, a trend that typically indicates upcoming exponential price gains. He mentioned several positive factors contributing to this, including the introduction of Dogecoin and Bonk Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) and the expected approval...

data.title: Dickey's Barbecue Pit to open new location in Canyon City, CO at 127 Justice Center Rd, led by franchisee Bobby Rusnak.
data.description: In Canyon City, Colorado, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit, the largest barbecue concept globally, is gearing up for the opening of a new location at 127 Justice Center Rd, Unit T, Canyon City, CO 81212. The expansion is spearheaded by experienced Dickey’s franchisee Bobby Rusnak, who emphasizes that the new restaurant symbolizes more than just a business venture. As a longstanding member of the Dickey’s family, Rusnak views each new establishment as an opportunity to not only offer great barbecue but also to foster community growth.

data.title: Price predictions for 9/12: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, LINK, HYPE, SUI. Strong spot Bitcoin ETF inflows suggest bullish momentum towards $117,500, may impact altcoins too.
data.description: Significant investments are flowing into spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds, indicating persistent interest from investors expecting a rise above the $117,500 resistance level. This trend suggests a potential bullish momentum and raises the question of whether alternative cryptocurrencies will also experience a similar surge in demand.

data.title: Prediction market Polymarket plans US return with CFTC support, new funding, and potential $10B valuation amid rising market popularity.
data.description: Polymarket, a prediction market platform, is gearing up for a reintroduction in the US with a major boost from the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), fresh funding, and a potential valuation reaching $10 billion. This move comes as prediction markets are swiftly gaining traction in the financial landscape.

data.title: FDA approved Apple Watch Ultra 3's hypertension alerts. Pre-orders open with availability on Sept. 19.
data.description: Apple Inc. unveiled the Apple Watch Ultra 3 on Tuesday, which can now be pre-ordered and will be officially available starting Friday, Sept. 19. The U.S Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved Apple's new hypertension notification feature, with the system set to be released after receiving FDA clearance on Thursday. This feature on the Apple Watch utilizes data from the optical heart sensor to monitor how a user's blood vessels react to the heart's beats. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Medra launches new Continuous Science Platform integrating robotics and AI to accelerate data generation for scientific discovery.
data.description: In San Francisco, a startup named Medra unveiled its groundbreaking Continuous Science Platform, designed to revolutionize scientific data generation and discovery by merging robotics and AI technology. This platform is the first of its kind and aims to address the issue of data scarcity in the scientific field. Unlike other models relying on vast datasets, Medra's system focuses on utilizing Physical AI for experimentation. The startup's vision is centered on the idea that overcoming data scarcity is crucial for AI to effectively combat diseases in the future.

data.title: UFG developed a solution for coffee bar pilferage at convenience stores 20 years ago.
data.description: In September 2025, in Elgin, Illinois, United Food Group (UFG) was tasked over two decades ago by a convenience store chain to address high levels of theft at the coffee bars in their stores. "UFG successfully tackled the issue within a few months," stated Bryan, the representative.

data.title: Winklevoss twins forecast $1M Bitcoin price in a decade as their exchange, Gemini, goes public.
data.description: Prominent crypto entrepreneur Tyler Winklevoss has expressed confidence in Bitcoin's future, predicting that its value could soar to $1 million per coin within the next decade. This assertion comes as his cryptocurrency exchange is preparing to go public, showcasing his belief in the sustained growth and potential of digital assets. This bold statement by Winklevoss reflects his optimistic outlook on the long-term trajectory of Bitcoin, emphasizing the significant opportunities that lie ahead in the evolving crypto market.

data.title: Psyx Research, Inc. introduces optimized 3D rendering for Cadence Tensilica HiFi DSPs, enhancing audio quality.
data.description: A new development from Psyx Research, Inc. unveils their advanced immersive rendering algorithms for Cadence Tensilica HiFi DSPs in San Diego. This advancement marks a significant milestone for the company, offering cutting-edge technology to users.

data.title: MCAP Inc. announces $0.10 dividend per share, payable on October 1, 2025, to shareholders of record.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on September 12, 2025, MCAP Inc. (OTC: MCAP) disclosed a dividend of $0.10 per common share. The Board of Directors at MCAP approved and announced this dividend, which will be paid out on October 1, 2025. Shareholders as of the end of business on the record date will be eligible to receive this dividend.

data.title: LTK reveals 2025 Award Winners at LTK Con 13 with focus on loyal creators and brands, celebrating authentic influence.
data.description: LTK, a leading company in the influencer industry, revealed the winners of the annual LTK Awards during the LTK Con 2025 event in Dallas. This marked the 13th edition of the creator conference. The awards recognized creators who have made significant contributions to culture and business by fostering dedicated communities on LTK. They also highlighted brands that have innovatively transformed creator collaborations. The winners for this year demonstrated the impact of genuine narratives, innovation, and credibility in influencing millions.

data.title: Curanex Pharmaceuticals Inc. has sold 562,500 additional shares at $4.00 each through an IPO's over-allotment option.
data.description: In Jericho, New York on September 12, 2025, Curanex Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: CURX) disclosed that Dominari Securities LLC, the lead underwriter for the Company’s IPO, has fully exercised the over-allotment option. This has resulted in the purchase of an additional 562,500 shares of common stock at the IPO price of $4.00 per share. Curanex focuses on developing botanical drugs for inflammatory diseases and is in the developmental stage.

data.title: President's economic goals rely on Supreme Court's tariff decision. Issuing unlimited tariffs crucial to vision for 2nd term.
data.description: The president aims to utilize the authority to impose tariffs without limits as a central aspect of his agenda for the second term, encompassing trade and foreign relations.

data.title: AI stocks rally with Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) soaring 40% after massive AI-related orders backlog, propelling CEO Larry Ellison's wealth close to $400 billion.
data.description: Stocks related to artificial intelligence experienced a significant boost in value on Wednesday as investors expressed confidence in the potential earnings growth driven by AI technology. This surge was triggered by Oracle Corp. (NYSE: ORCL) announcing a substantial backlog of AI-related orders. Following this announcement, Oracle's stock price soared by over 40%, marking its most robust single-day performance since December 1992. Despite falling short of Wall Street expectations in revenue and earnings in the previous quarter, the focus shifted to Oracle's multi-cloud database business, which saw a remarkable 1,529% year-over-year growth due to collaborations with major players like Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN), Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOGL), and Microsoft Corp. (NYSE: MSFT). The surge propelled Oracle towards the coveted $1 trillion market cap club, positioning it as the ninth most valuable company in the U.S. This rally also significantly boosted the fortune of CEO Larry Ellison by over $100 billion in a single session, elevating his net worth to nearly $400 billion - sitting just under $40 billion below Elon Musk, the current world's wealthiest individual. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Wiener Bank SE partners with Real Finance to use blockchain tech for asset management, reshaping finance.
data.description: In Vienna, Austria on September 12, 2025, Wiener Bank SE, a prominent player in financial innovation and private banking, revealed a groundbreaking strategic alliance with Real Finance, a trailblazer in Web 3.0 infrastructure. This partnership is set to reshape the asset sector.

data.title: Cassidy Spencer joins Barwick Banking Company as Vice President, Mortgage Banker in St. Augustine with 23 years of experience.
data.description: A new addition to the Barwick Banking Company in St. Augustine, Florida has been made as Cassidy Spencer joins the team as Vice President, Mortgage Banker. Spencer comes with an extensive background of over 23 years in residential lending, demonstrating exceptional leadership skills throughout their career.
